techniques.name: LSASS Memory
techniques.evidence: Cobalt Strike injects into the LSASS process to steal cached credentials.

techniques.name: PowerShell
techniques.evidence: The attackers used a PowerShell loader method to deploy a Beacon.

techniques.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
techniques.evidence: IcedID exfiltrates the results via the C2 channel.

techniques.name: Lateral Tool Transfer
techniques.evidence: The attackers used Cobalt Strike’s jump psexec_psh capability to move laterally.

techniques.name: Regsvr32
techniques.evidence: A batch script schedules a task to execute a command to load a Cobalt Strike Beacon into memory using regsvr32.

techniques.name: Scheduled Task
techniques.evidence: The attackers used batch scripts for persistence, defense evasion and execution tasks.

techniques.name: Disable or Modify Tools
techniques.evidence: The operators execute various batch scripts to disable antivirus programs.

techniques.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
techniques.evidence: The threat actors moved towards their final objective of deploying XingLocker ransomware.
